# Mini PAD Submitter - site list
#
# One block per site:
#   Name|HomeURL|Action|METHOD
#       key=value            (form field sent with the submission)
#       query:key=value      (sent as a URL query param instead of a form field - rare)
#
# Use $PAD as the placeholder for the actual PAD file URL in any value.
# METHOD is GET or POST. Blank line separates entries. Lines starting with # are comments.
# Add, remove, or edit entries here - no recompilation needed, just restart the program.

2Software|http://www.2-software.net/submit.html|/submit.html|POST
    pad_file_url=$PAD
    pad_submitted=Submit PAD File

AbabaSoft|http://www.ababasoft.com/index.html|checkadd.php|POST
    padurl=$PAD
    psubmit=Submit PAD File

    padurl=$PAD

    padfile=$PAD

    url=$PAD

    psubmit=Submit PAD File
